parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { collector_id: $json.collector_id, collector_name: $json.collector_name, status: $json.status, last_run_at: $json.finished_at, last_run_duration_ms: $json.duration_ms, items_fetched: $json.items_fetched, items_stored: $json.items_stored, items_duplicate: $json.items_duplicate, items_skipped: $json.items_skipped, store_failures: $json.store_failures, current_version: $json.version } }}

_meta.description: Universal pipeline sub-workflow. Called by every collector via Execute Workflow node. Only the Fetch step in the parent collector workflow differs between collectors.
